skills.name: briefing
skills.description: Compile context from the brain before meetings, coding sessions, or project reviews.

skills.name: digest
skills.description: Extract structured knowledge from ChatGPT conversation exports.

skills.name: harvest
skills.description: Extract learnings from Claude Code session logs and save them to the brain.

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Import and harvest data into the brain.

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Keep the brain healthy and up to date.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Search and retrieve knowledge from the brain.
